{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOCKED: PR body violates kaizen invariant I1 — every PR must close exactly one scope-matched issue via a closing keyword (Closes|Fixes|Resolves) adjacent to #<N>. No such pattern found in PR body.

Recovery:
  Edit PR body to add `Closes #<scope-matched-sub-issue>` on its own line.

See docs/kaizen-invariants.md (I1) for details."}}
